name: G-5 aggregator: cache_status reports hit or miss so F-2 reports hit rate
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>err.txt; grep -qE '"cache_status":"(hit|miss)"' err.txt && echo cache_reported 1>&2
